test_output_summary: 264 passed (254 non-GOAL.md tests pass; 10 new TASK-FPF1-003 tests pass; 5 pre-existing GOAL.md failures unrelated to this task)
implementation_notes: Replaced the 'for turn in range(config.max_turns)' loop with a while-loop using three counters: coach_turn (real Coach evaluations), format_retries (format gate failures), and total_invocations (all Player calls). The format gate failure branch now increments format_retries and breaks when format_retries > config.max_format_retries, rather than consuming from the coach budget. coach_turn is incremented only after the format gate passes, immediately before the Coach is invoked. Added max_format_retries field (default=3, ge=0) to GenerationConfig in config/models.py. Updated all turn-related log messages: player and format-gate logs use total_invocations, coach-related logs use coach_turn. All return paths now return total_invocations as turns_used (for backward compatibility with token accounting). The target_accepted log now includes both coach_turns and total_invocations. Updated _MinimalConfig stubs in two existing test files to include max_format_retries=3. Updated one existing test (test_format_gate_sends_format_error_feedback) to use max_format_retries=0 to preserve its single-log assertion, which was correct under the old for-loop semantics.
requirements_addressed: Replace for-loop with while-loop separating coach_turn from format_retries
Format gate failures do NOT increment coach_turn counter
Format retries bounded by configurable max_format_retries (break when exceeded)
Coach turns still bounded by config.max_turns
Write validation failures still count as a coach_turn
Post-gen validation failures still count as a coach_turn
Turn reporting updated: target_accepted logs both coach_turns and total_invocations
All return paths return total_invocations as turns_used
All existing generation loop tests pass
New test: target with 2 format failures + 1 Coach accept = accepted
New test: turn count reporting correct for mixed format/coach turns
